debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
C : Error.Call n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
IH :
  ∀ (o : Error.maxOne n σ)
    (a_kv_b :
      Error.eval n S ⟨σ, o⟩
        (Error.Form.Neg n
          (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
            (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))),
    (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩
o : Error.maxOne n (C :: σ)
a_kv_b :
  Error.eval n S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩
    (Error.Form.Neg n
      (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
        (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))
ra : Error.roleOfIn n a C = Error.Role.Callee
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩

failed_attempts:
· specialize IH (⁻o) h
        unfold resultSet
        simp only [ra, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
        let C_copy := C
        cases C <;> simp_all <;> subst ra
        all_goals
          refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
          · simp [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def, not_forall,
              Bool.not_eq_not]
            use S
            simp only [and_true]
            use ⟨σ,⁻o⟩
            simp
          · use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩; simp; use C_copy; unfold C_copy; simp [roleOfIn]
          · rw [eval_dis] at h
            intro not_in_callee not_a_knows T τ same_len equ
            cases h_b : S b
            all_goals
              exfalso
              simp_all only [Bool.not_false, Bool.not_true, or_false, false_or]
              have := true_of_knowldege h
              simp_all
      · clear IH
        rw [eval_dis] at h
        push_neg at h
        rcases h with ⟨a_not_know_before_t, a_not_know_before_f⟩
        rw [eval_dis] at a_kv_b
        rcases a_kv_b with (a_knows_after_t | a_knows_after_f)
        · have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
          simp at this
          unfold resultSet
          cases C <;> simp [ra] <;> simp at ra <;> subst ra
          all_goals sorry
        · have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
          simp at this
          unfold resultSet
          cases C <;> simp [ra] <;> simp at ra <;> subst ra
          all_goals sorry
    case Other =>
      unfold resultSet
      simp [ra]
      apply IH
      rwa [not_in_call_then_invariant_kv ra] at a_kv_b

            · intro k_false
              have := true_of_knowldege k_false
              simp [stubbornness] at this
            · intro T τ len equ C' role same_contrib
              use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩
              simp
              use C_copy
              simp [C_copy, roleOfIn]
          · intro h_in
            simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_forall, Bool.not_eq_not] at h_in
            rcases h_in with ⟨⟨(in_old|in_new), not_refused⟩, not_deleted⟩
            · apply IH.2; assumption
            · apply not_refused
              rcases h with (hT|hF)
              · left; simp at hT; cases S b <;> simp_all
              · right; simp at hF; cases S b <;> simp_all
      · sorry
